title: flaveria humillima
intro: Flaveria humillima, also known as the "Small Flaveria," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to South America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Flaveria humillima are typically used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its potential medicinal and health benefits.
